reviews.title: Trusted by Thousands of Travelers
reviews.1.d: The lines at Phuket were massive. Seeing my name on a sign at the gate and being whisked through in minutes was incredible. Worth every baht!
reviews.2.d: Coming off a long flight with kids is hard. Our escort handled everything, and we were at our hotel while other passengers were still in line. Highly recommend!
reviews.3.d: I use this service for every business trip to Thailand. They are always on time, even with delays. The most professional team at HKT.
reviews.4.d: Excellent communication via WhatsApp. Our guide was waiting right where they said they would be. A truly seamless experience.
reviews.5.d: Saved at least 2 hours of waiting. If you value your time, this is the only way to arrive in Phuket.
reviews.6.d: After a 12-hour flight, this was a lifesaver. Friendly staff and very efficient process through the airport.
reviews.7.d: Professional, fast, and polite. They made the arrival process so much smoother than I expected.
reviews.8.d: Our guide helped us with our luggage and even coordinated with our driver. Truly exceptional service.
reviews.9.d: The departure service is just as good as arrival. No stress at check-in or security whatsoever.
reviews.10.d: Everything was perfectly organized. The communication was clear, and the service was exactly as described.

faq.title: Phuket VIP Fast Track FAQ
faq.1.q: Exactly how much time will I save?
faq.1.a: During peak hours, standard lines can take 60-120 minutes. With our VIP Fast Track, you'll typically be through in under 5 minutes.
faq.2.q: Where will my escort be waiting?
faq.2.a: For arrivals, we meet you right at the aircraft's gate (jet bridge). For departures, we meet you at a designated spot outside the terminal entrance.
faq.3.q: What if my flight to Phuket is late?
faq.3.a: We monitor all flight statuses in real-time. If you're delayed, your escort will be there whenever you land—no extra charge. We offer full flexibility for cancellations too.
faq.4.q: Is the TDAC form required with VIP service?
faq.4.a: Yes, everyone entering Thailand needs the TDAC QR code. Our Combo Package includes full assistance with this form to ensure it's done correctly.
faq.5.q: How early should I book the service?
faq.5.a: We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance. For the busy season (Nov-Mar), booking 48-72 hours ahead ensures guaranteed availability during peak times.
faq.6.q: Does this work for all airlines at HKT?
faq.6.a: Yes, our VIP Meet and Assist is available for every international airline operating at Phuket Airport, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

tdac_modal.title: Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC) Instructions
tdac_modal.p1: The TDAC (formerly TM6) is mandatory for all international visitors in 2026.
tdac_modal.scam_desc: The official government portal is free. Do not pay third-party sites for this form. Use only: tdac.immigration.go.th.
tdac_modal.step1: Register online up to 72 hours before your arrival.
tdac_modal.step2: Select 'Phuket International Airport (HKT)' as your port of entry.
tdac_modal.step3: Enter your passport details and flight number accurately.
tdac_modal.step4: Download and save the QR code to show immigration on your mobile device.
modal.terms.title: Service Terms & Conditions
modal.terms.desc:
1. OVERVIEW OF SERVICES
Phuket Airport Fast Track (the "Agency") provides professional VIP Meet & Assist services at Phuket International Airport (HKT). Our services include Arrival Fast Track, Departure VIP, and Combo Packages designed to minimize wait times and provide seamless airport navigation.

2. BOOKING & CONFIRMATION
2.1 All bookings must be made at least 24 hours prior to service time.
2.2 A booking is only confirmed once full prepayment is received and a confirmation voucher is issued via WhatsApp, Telegram, or Email.
2.3 It is the passenger's responsibility to provide accurate flight numbers and arrival/departure times.

3. PRICING & PAYMENT
3.1 Prices are quoted in Thai Baht (THB).
3.2 Children under 12 receive a 50% discount. Infants (0-2 years) are free of charge.
3.3 Group rates apply for 2 or more paying passengers.

4. CANCELLATION & REFUND POLICY
4.1 100% Refund: If cancelled at least 24 hours before the scheduled service time.
4.2 100% Refund: If the airline cancels the flight and a new booking is not required.
4.3 No Refund: For "No-Shows" or cancellations made less than 24 hours before the service.
4.4 Amendments: Free of charge if requested at least 12 hours before arrival.

5. FLIGHT DELAYS & MONITORING
5.1 Our team monitors all HKT flight schedules in real-time.
5.2 If your flight is delayed, your professional escort will adjust their meeting time automatically at no extra cost.

6. PASSENGER CONDUCT & RESPONSIBILITIES
6.1 Passengers must possess valid travel documents (Passport, Visa, TDAC QR code).
6.2 Dress Code: Official HKT immigration zones require modest attire. Avoid sleeveless shirts or swimwear during processing.
6.3 The Agency is not liable for entry denial by Thai Immigration authorities for any reason.

7. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
The Agency acts as a facilitator between the passenger and airport authorities. We are not responsible for delays caused by official government processing, immigration checks, or airport infrastructure issues.
modal.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
modal.privacy.desc:
1. DATA COLLECTION
We collect minimal personal data required to fulfill your VIP Fast Track service at HKT. This includes your Full Name, Flight Number, Passport Number (when required for official coordination), and Contact Details (WhatsApp/Telegram).

2. HOW WE USE YOUR INFORMATION
2.1 To coordinate your meeting point at Phuket Airport with our professional escorts.
2.2 To monitor your flight status for real-time adjustments.
2.3 To assist in filling out mandatory entry forms like the Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC).

3. DATA RETENTION & SECURITY
3.1 All personal data is stored securely and is only accessible by the coordinating team.
3.2 Data Erasure: All sensitive travel data (flight and passport info) is permanently wiped from our systems 7 days after the service is completed.
3.3 Encrypted Communication: We exclusively use end-to-end encrypted platforms (WhatsApp and Telegram) for all status updates and personal info exchanges.

4. THIRD-PARTY DISCLOSURE
We do not sell or share your data with marketing agencies. We only disclose necessary details to official Phuket Airport authorities and our certified escort partners to ensure your fast-track processing.

5. YOUR RIGHTS
You have the right to request a summary of the data we hold or request its immediate deletion at any time prior to or after your service.
